messages.content: fix grammar and spelling: To meet our goals we need to talk, learn from our users, audit pre-existing research to learn more about who our target audience is, and assess if we are meeting their needs, and solving their problems

To meet our goals, we need to talk, learn from our users, audit pre-existing research to learn more about who our target audience is, and assess if we are meeting their needs and solving their problems.

The purpose of this project is to conduct user research activities in an effort to gain empathy from our users by digging deep to understand enough about them, their environment, needs, goals, pain points, and how they use our product.
Decrease the level of assumptions during problem-solving and solution design. In order to, apply product features and fixes that are more relevant and considerate of our users' needs and frustrations; which will ultimately lead to better usability, conversion, and NPS.

The purpose of this project is to conduct user research activities in an effort to gain empathy from our users. By digging deep to understand more about their environment, needs, goals, pain points, and how they use our product, we aim to decrease the level of assumptions during problem-solving and solution design. This will help us to develop product features and fixes that are more relevant and considerate of our users' needs and frustrations. Ultimately, this approach will lead to better usability, conversion, and NPS.

The purpose of this project is to:
- conduct user research activities in an effort to gain empathy from our users by digging deep to understand enough about them, their environment, needs, goals, pain points, and how they use our product.
- Decrease the level of assumptions during problem-solving and solution design. In order to, apply product features and fixes that are more relevant and considerate of our users' needs and frustrations; which will ultimately lead to better usability, conversion, and NPS.

The purpose of this project is twofold: 
1. We aim to conduct user research activities to gain empathy from our users. Our goal is to understand our users' environment, needs, goals, pain points, and how they use our product in order to provide a better user experience.
2. We also aim to decrease the level of assumptions during problem-solving and solution design. By understanding our users better, we can apply product features and fixes that are more relevant and considerate of their needs and frustrations. This will ultimately lead to better usability, conversion, and NPS.
Provided more than 25 recommendations & opportunities for the main pain points mentioned by our customers

Now let’s see the process in details that I go through for any Perona project

Define the goal of the research, gather facts and assumptions and the missing info they are interested in knowing

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"The first step is to define the goal of the research and gather relevant facts and assumptions. We also identify any missing information that the team is interested in knowing."
Assumption Mapping: Where we ask stakeholders to write whatever they know about the users

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"Next, we conduct an Assumption Mapping exercise where we ask stakeholders to write down whatever they know about the users."
Users segmentation: Where we ask stakeholders to segment users based on the assumptions

The following statement has better grammar and spelling: 
"After the Assumption Mapping exercise, we move on to User Segmentation, where we ask stakeholders to segment users based on the assumptions gathered."
Where we gather as much info from them in order to be able to define the goal of the project

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:

Individual interviews: Where we gather as much info from them in order to be able to define the goal of the project

Apart from the workshop we sit with different stakeholders from management individually to gather detailed data about operations

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"In addition to the workshop, we also sit down individually with different stakeholders from management to gather detailed data about operations."
Apart from the workshop we interview different stakeholders from management individually to gather detailed data about operations

The following statement has better grammar and spelling: 
"In addition to the workshop, we conduct individual interviews with different stakeholders from management to gather detailed data about operations."

methodology: Based on the defined goals, and assumptions from interviews and workshop, I set the goals of what we need to know about our users in order to define their needs, then I specify questions to help me answer any question that might come up from the goal

The following statement has better grammar and spelling: 
"My methodology is based on the defined goals and assumptions gathered from both individual interviews and the workshop. I set goals for what we need to know about our users in order to define their needs. Then, I specify questions to help me answer any question that might come up from the goal."

User segmentation methodology: In order to define different personas we need to interview different user groups for example: - Different ages, nationalities, business segments, Different cities 
Then define the minimum number to interview from each in order to have valid info and insights

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"Our User Segmentation methodology involves interviewing different user groups, such as those of different ages, nationalities, business segments, and from different cities. We determine the minimum number of users to interview from each group to ensure that we have valid information and insights, allowing us to define different personas."

step 1: After user profile is identified we extract candidate users from our data based on what we need 
step 2: Then these users are distributed to different team members in order to have a bigger coverage

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"Our process involves two steps. First, we identify the user profile and extract candidate users from our data based on our needs. Next, we distribute these users to different team members to ensure we have a larger coverage."

user interviews methodology: The interview is recorded to be documented later in order to have a more friendly conversation with the user which would help in getting extra insights. After interview the survey is filled and insights document is created

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"Our User Interviews methodology includes recording the interview to be documented later. This helps us have a more friendly conversation with the user, which in turn helps in getting extra insights. After the interview, we fill out a survey and create an insights document."

The interview is recorded to be documented later in order to have a more friendly conversation with the user which would help in getting extra insights. After interview the survey is filled and insights document is created

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"Our User Interviews methodology involves recording the interview to be documented later. This enables us to have a more relaxed and friendly conversation with the user, which helps in getting additional insights. After conducting the interview, we fill out a survey and create an insights document."

Data analysis methodology: Data is cleaned and then analyzed in a structured way based on different section, topics, and process. % are generated and if needed charts are generated too. during analysis we look for different patterns we can analyze from the results we have, like comparing answers of different age group or different nationalities

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"Our Data Analysis methodology involves cleaning and structuring the data based on different sections, topics, and processes. We generate percentages, and if needed, charts as well. During the analysis, we look for different patterns we can analyze from the results we have, such as comparing answers of different age groups or nationalities."
don't include Our Data Analysis methodology involves

"During the Data Analysis phase, we clean and structure the data into different sections, topics, and processes. We produce percentages and graphs, where necessary. As we analyze the data collected, we identify different patterns, such as comparing answers from different age groups or nationalities. These patterns help us draw meaningful conclusions and make informed decisions."

I clean and structure the data into different sections, topics, and processes. Then produce percentages and graphs, where necessary. As I analyze the data collected, I identify different patterns, such as comparing answers from different age groups or nationalities. These patterns help me draw meaningful conclusions and recommendations

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"In the Data Analysis phase, I clean and structure the data into different sections, topics, and processes. I produce percentages and graphs, where necessary. As I analyze the collected data, I identify different patterns, such as comparing answers from different age groups or nationalities. These patterns help me draw meaningful conclusions and make informed recommendations."

I documented and presented data in a story telling way on notion where I took the employees through the users journey and explained the behavior, needs, and pinpoints in each step of the journey. Stopping at each stage to discuss insights and present the recommendations and the opportunities we have to improve this stage of the journey

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"I present the findings to the team in a storytelling format on Notion. I take them through the user journey and explain the behavior, needs, and pain points at each step. I pause at each stage to discuss insights and present recommendations and opportunities to improve that stage of the journey."
At the end of the presentation each stakeholder and employee had the magic formula of what each user archetype needs in order to be satisfied and have a better experience

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"At the end of the presentation, each stakeholder and employee has access to the formula necessary to satisfy each user archetype and improve their experience."
Different persona cards according to different user segments and behaviours

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"We create different persona cards based on different user segments and behaviors."
Results along with the a summary of analysis and extra insights

The following statement has better grammar and spelling:
"We present the results, along with a summary of the analysis and any additional insights we may have uncovered."
cut this short: Results are presented along with a summary of the analysis and any additional insights we may have uncovered
"Results are presented along with a summary of the analysis and any extra insights we uncovered."
A table that has a recommendation for every need or pain that has a possible solution
"We create a table that has recommendations for every need or pain, along with a possible solution."
Doing deeper analysis for the most mentioned pain points and creating solutions for it
"We do a deeper analysis for the most mentioned pain points and create suitable solutions for them."

Mapping out the current journey the user go through online and offline to understand where are the touchpoints and what are the pain and friction points in each stage, in order to implement fixes and enhance the customer experience

"We map out the current journey that the user goes through, both online and offline. This helps us understand where the touchpoints are and what the pain and friction points are in each stage. By doing so, we can implement fixes and enhance the customer experience."

Step 1:  
To meet the goal of journey mapping projects, I had to have multiple interviews with multiple stakeholders and team members in order to understand the whole process step by step to be able to map the journey

Step 1: "To meet the goal of journey mapping projects, I conduct multiple interviews with stakeholders and team members to understand the entire process step by step. This understanding is necessary before mapping out the journey."

To meet the goal of journey mapping projects, I conduct multiple interviews with stakeholders and team members to understand the entire process step by step. This understanding is necessary to map the journey correctly

"Conducting multiple interviews with stakeholders and team members is a crucial step to meeting the goal of journey mapping projects. This helps in understanding the entire process step by step, which is necessary to map the journey correctly."

Step 2:
Use our current metrics and numbers to identify friction points and pain points in our process
Step 2: "Using our current metrics and numbers, we identify friction points and pain points in our process."

Step 3:
Create a blue print where the steps are simplifies, along with identifying the quantitative and qualitative data, and specifying where we have a good process and where we don’t along with the reasons

Step 3: "We create a blueprint where steps are simplified, identifying quantitative and qualitative data. We also specify where we have a sound process and where we don't, along with identifying the reasons."

Step 4:
Suggest a new process that would help us over come the issues that are affecting the customer experience
Step 4: "Based on our blueprint, we propose a new process to overcome the issues that are affecting the customer experience."

Project goals:
In order to enhance customer experience and reduce unwanted and unnecessary communication I mapped out the every touch point of any communication, and in this journey specifically I had to include online and offline touch points along with the used tools. Then after analyzing the journey and specifying where are the issues, new rules were made for different teams along with a new journey to follow when communicating customers

Project goals: "The goal of the project was to enhance customer experience and reduce unwanted and unnecessary communication. To achieve this, I mapped out every touchpoint of any communication, including online and offline touchpoints and the tools used in each. After analyzing the journey and identifying issues, new rules were introduced for different teams, along with a new customer communication journey to follow."

Results:
- Provided stakeholders with a structured process on how, when, and with what to communicate customers in order to limit over and intersected communications
- Coordinated with the data team in order to track any communications and get use of them

Results: "The project provided stakeholders with a structured communication process outlining how, when, and with what to communicate to customers, thereby limiting over and intersected communications. We coordinated with the data team to track all communications and make use of the data to ensure better user experience."
An ongoing project that kept influencing other solutions
"This was an ongoing project that continually influenced other solutions and strategies within the company."

Mapped the whole journey where we communicate the customer whether online or offline, and then identified the teams that are doing these communications along with the tools, in order to identify intersection points and get data on number of communications the user gets. then identify on the map where we found pain points

"We mapped the entire customer journey, including both online and offline communication touchpoints, and identified the teams responsible for these communications and the tools used. This allowed us to identify intersection points and gather data on the number of communications the user receives. We also identified pain points on the journey map."
Mapping out the current processes that all teams go through when communicating with customers to have a full overview of it and find the friction points

"We map out the current processes that all teams go through when communicating with customers to gain a comprehensive overview. This allows us to identify friction points and pain points in the processes."
List down the issues that the current process is facing and list down the good elements of communication management
"We list down the issues that the current process is facing and identify the good elements of communication management."
Create a suggested process for each team to follow while communicating with our customers
"We develop a suggested process for each team to follow when communicating with customers."

Mapped the whole journey where we communicate the customer whether online or offline, and then identified the teams that are doing these communications along with the tools, in order to identify intersection points and get data on number of communications the user gets. then identify on the map where we found pain points

"We map out the complete customer journey including online and offline communication touchpoints, and then identify the teams and tools involved in these communications. This enables us to locate intersection points and gather data on the number of communications a user receives. Moreover, we identify pain points on the journey map."
I Suggested a new journey for communicating with the customer and then specified which team is responsible for which stage and mapped it out
"I suggest a new roadmap for communicating with customers. Then, I specify which team is responsible for which stage and map it out."
I suggested a new process for communicating with customers. Then, I specified rules on which team is responsible for which stage and mapped it out

"I recommend a new process for communicating with customers. Following that, I establish guidelines that outline which teams are accountable for which steps in the communication process, and subsequently map the new process out."
These projects are done on a regular basis (weekly, biweekly, monthly, and quarterly) in order to track metrics and keep track of any pain points that are causing a bad experience for our customers

"These projects are conducted on a regular basis, such as weekly, biweekly, monthly, and quarterly intervals. The purpose is to continuously monitor metrics and examine any pain points that might be contributing to a poor customer experience."

Methodology differs from each project to another, but the steps below are the general approach and methodology I go through for these kinds of projects. and different projects might have extra customized approach

"My methodology varies depending on the project, but the following steps outline the general approach I undertake for these projects. It's worth noting that each project comes with its unique needs and may require a customized approach."
